meaning: pron.我n.字母I,[化]碘元素,罗马数字1 /n.输入输出地址 /n.输入输出重定向 /[计]Input/Output,输入/输出
examples: I deeply regret what I said.

You should bear in mind that I have no military or training link with the base.
